key.description: Stable dashboard and icon slug (e.g. profile). Use when display name differs from the icon key.

actor.description: Co-id reference to actor definition (root actor for this vibe)

dependencies.description: Explicit actor $ids whose inboxes must be watched (service actors this vibe sends to)

runtime.description: Runtime colocation - which runtimes this vibe runs on (e.g. browser, server)

icon.description: Bracket ref °maia/data/icons.data.json[<nanoid>] — resolves to seeded CoText co-id after transform
